instruction: Two issues on the strikethrough icon: the base outline is wrongly tinted green, AND the thin black frame circle on top is the wrong color (purple). Fix both.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/strikethrough.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #22c55e" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M12 12a8.912 8.912 0 0 1-.318-.079c-1.585-.424-2.904-1.247-3.76-2.236-.873-1.009-1.265-2.19-.968-3.301.59-2.2 3.663-3.29 6.863-2.432A8.186 8.186 0 0 1 16.5 5.21M6.42 17.81c.857.99 2.176 1.812 3.761 2.237 3.2.858 6.274-.23 6.863-2.431.233-.868.044-1.779-.465-2.617M3.75 12h16.5"/></g>
  <circle id="frame" fill="#a855f7" stroke="#222" stroke-width="1" cx="64" cy="64" r="60" />
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/strikethrough.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M12 12a8.912 8.912 0 0 1-.318-.079c-1.585-.424-2.904-1.247-3.76-2.236-.873-1.009-1.265-2.19-.968-3.301.59-2.2 3.663-3.29 6.863-2.432A8.186 8.186 0 0 1 16.5 5.21M6.42 17.81c.857.99 2.176 1.812 3.761 2.237 3.2.858 6.274-.23 6.863-2.431.233-.868.044-1.779-.465-2.617M3.75 12h16.5"/></g>
  <circle id="frame" fill="none" stroke="#222" stroke-width="1" cx="64" cy="64" r="60" />
</svg>
